name: Applesauce Cake in Jars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar to the creamed butter and beat until fluffy.
3. Add applesauce, mixing thoroughly.
4. Sift together all dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, ground cloves, nutmeg, allspice) and add them to the mixture.
5. Fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the cake mixture into wide-mouth canning jars.
7. Grease the inside of the jars well to ensure easy release of the baked cakes.
8. Line the bottom of the jars with waxed paper for added stability.
9. Cover each jar with a piece of foil, greased side down.
10. Place the jars in a crockpot or heavy-duty baking dish.
11. Cook on high-heat setting for 2 3/4 to 3 hours, or until the cakes spring back when touched and a wooden toothpick inserted near the centers comes out clean.
12. Allow the jars to cool for 10 minutes before removing them from the crockpot.
13. Unmold the cakes and remove the waxed paper.
14. Serve warm or at room temperature with whipped topping, if desired.
Judy Garnett/Raleigh, NC (wrv)
